content_id: Beliau menghabiskan sepuluh tahun menegakkan itu, setelah itu beliau wafat, semoga Allah mencurahkan shalawat dan salam atasnya. Nabi menjalankan itu selama sepuluh tahun setelah hijrahnya; kemudian setelah Allah menyempurnakan agama melalui beliau, dan menyempurnakan nikmat-Nya atas orang-orang beriman, maka Allah memilih beliau untuk bergabung dengan teman-teman tertinggi, yaitu para nabi, pengikut-pengikut setia mereka, para syuhada dan orang-orang shaleh. Maka beliau jatuh sakit pada akhir bulan Safar dan awal bulan Rabi'ul-Awwal. Maka beliau keluar kepada orang-orang dengan kepalanya terikat (dengan kain). Beliau naik mimbar, mengucapkan syahadat, dan hal pertama yang beliau katakan setelah itu adalah meminta ampunan bagi para syuhada yang gugur di Uhud. Kemudian beliau bersabda: 'Seorang hamba dari hamba-hamba Allah telah diberi pilihan oleh Allah antara dunia dan apa yang ada di sisi-Nya; maka ia memilih apa yang ada di sisi Allah.' Maka Abu Bakar, semoga Allah meridhainya, memahami ini dan menangis. Kemudian beliau memerintahkan agar Abu Bakar memimpin orang-orang dalam shalat. Kemudian ketika hari Senin - tanggal dua belas atau tiga belas bulan Rabi'ul-Awwal, tahun kesebelas setelah hijrah, Allah memilih beliau untuk menemani-Nya. Maka ketika kematian datang kepadanya beliau mulai mencelupkan tangannya ke dalam air yang ada di sisinya, mengusap wajahnya dan berkata: 'Tidak ada yang berhak untuk disembah kecuali Allah, sesungguhnya kematian memiliki kepedihan-kepedihannya.' Kemudian beliau mengarahkan pandangannya ke langit dan berkata: 'Ya Allah, di antara teman-teman tertinggi.' Maka beliau wafat pada hari itu, dan orang-orang sangat bersedih dan terguncang karenanya, dan memang sepantasnya begitu. Sampai Abu Bakar, semoga Allah meridhainya, datang dan naik mimbar dan memuji serta mengagungkan Allah, kemudian berkata: 'Adapun setelah itu, maka barangsiapa menyembah Muhammad, maka Muhammad telah wafat; dan barangsiapa menyembah Allah, maka Allah hidup dan tidak pernah mati.' Kemudian beliau membacakan: 'Muhammad itu tidak lain hanyalah seorang rasul, sungguh telah berlalu sebelumnya beberapa orang rasul. Apakah Jika dia wafat atau dibunuh kamu berbalik ke belakang (murtad)?' [Surat Ali Imran (3): 144]. Maka orang-orang menangis dengan sangat dan mengetahui bahwa beliau telah wafat. Maka beliau dimandikan dalam pakaiannya karena menghormatinya. Kemudian beliau dikafankan dengan tiga lembar kain putih bersih (kapas), tanpa jubah maupun surban yang digunakan. Kemudian orang-orang menshalatinya secara terpisah tanpa seorang imam. Kemudian beliau dikuburkan pada malam sebelum hari Rabu - setelah baiat diselesaikan untuk Khalifah yang datang setelahnya. Maka semoga pujian terbaik dari Tuhannya dan kedamaian yang sempurna tercurah atasnya. Dan agamanya tetap ada, dan inilah agamanya: Tidak ada kebaikan kecuali beliau menunjukkan umatnya kepadanya, dan tidak ada keburukan kecuali beliau memperingatkan mereka darinya. Maka kebaikan yang beliau seru mereka kepadanya adalah at-tauhid, dan semua yang Allah cintai dan ridhai; dan keburukan yang beliau peringatkan darinya adalah asy-syirik dan semua yang Allah benci dan tolak. Allah mengutus beliau sebagai Rasul kepada semua manusia, dan Allah mewajibkan atas semua jin dan manusia untuk menaatinya. Dalilnya adalah firman Allah Yang Maha Tinggi: 'Katakanlah: Hai manusia sesungguhnya aku adalah utusan Allah kepadamu semua.'
content_en: He spent ten years establishing that, after which he passed away, May Allaah extol and send blessings of peace upon him [146] ___________________________________________________________ The Prophet carried that out for ten years after his migration; then after Allaah had completed the Religion through him, and had perfected His favour upon the Believers, then Allaah chose him to join the highest companionship, that of the prophets, their sincere followers, the martyrs and the righteous folk. So he (SiO became ill at the end of the month of Safar and the beginning of the month of Rabee'ul-Awwal. So he went out to the people with his head bound (with a cloth). He ascended the mimbar, declared the testification of Faith, and the first thing that he said after that was to seek forgiveness for the martyrs who were killed at Uhud. Then he said: "A servant from the servants of Allaah has been given a choice by Allaah between this world and what is with Him; so he chose that which is with Allaah." So Aboo Bakr, radiyallaahu 'anhu, understood this and wept, and said: "May my father and mother be a ransom for you, we would pay our fathers our mothers, our children, our selves, and our wealth as a ransom for you." So the Prophet (Uj£) said: "Do not be hasty, O Aboo Bakr" Then he said: "The person who has favoured me most with his companionship and his wealth is Aboo Bakr, and if I were to take someone as the one particularly beloved friend to me besides my Lord, then I would have taken Aboo Bakr as such. However it is rather the Islamic friendship and love." Then he ordered that Aboo Bakr should lead the people in the Prayer. Then when it was the day of Monday - the twelfth or thirteenth of the month of Rabee'ulAwwal, of the eleventh year after the hijrah, Allaah chose him for His company. So when death came to him he began dipping his hand into some water he had besides him, and wiping his face and saying: ''None has the right to be worshipped except Allaah, indeed death has its agonies" Then he turned his sight towards the heavens and said: "O Allaah, amongst the highest companionship." So he passed away on that day, and the people were greatly distressed and disturbed due to that, and rightly so. Until Aboo Bakr, radiyallaahu 'anhu, came and ascended the mimbar and praised and exalted Allaah, and then said: "To proceed, then whoever worshipped Muhammad, then Muhammad has died; and whoever worships Allaah, then Allaah lives and never dies." Then he recited: "Muhammad is but a messenger, messengers have passed away before him. So if he dies or is killed will you turn back from you Religion." [surah Aal-Tmraan (3):144] "O Muhammad (30,), you will soon die and your people, those who deny you and those who believe - will die." [surah az-Zumar (39):30] So the people wept severely and knew that he had died. So he was washed in his clothes out of respect for him. Then he was shrouded in three pure white (cotton) sheets, with no robe or turban being used. Then the people prayed over him separately without a single imaam. Then he was buried on the night before Wednesday - after the pledge of allegiance was completed for the Caliph who came after him. So may the most excellent praise of his Lord and perfect peace be upon him. and his Religion remains, and this is his Religion: There is no good except that he guided his ummah to it, and no evil except that he warned them against it. So the good that he called them to was at-tawhid, and all that Allaah loves and is pleased with; and the evil that he warned against was ash-shirk and all that Allaah hates and rejects. Allaah sent him as a Messenger to all of the people, and Allaah made it obligatory upon all of the jinn and mankind to obey him. The proof is the Saying of Allaah, the Most High, "Say, O Muhammad, to all of the people: 'I am the Messenger of Allaah to you all"?
content_ar: He spent ten years establishing that, بعد which he passed away, May Allaah extol and send البركات of peace upon him [146] ___________________________________________________________ النبي ﷺ carried that out for ten years بعد his migration; then بعد Allaah had completed the Religion through him, and had perfected His النعمة upon the المؤمنون, then Allaah chose him to join the highest companionship, that of the الأنبياء, their sincere followers, the martyrs and the الصالح folk. لذا he (SiO became ill at the end of the month of Safar and the beginning of the month of Rabee'ul-Awwal. لذا he went out to the people with his head bound (with a cloth). He ascended the mimbar, declared the testification of الإيمان, and the أولاً thing that قال بعد that was to seek المغفرة for the martyrs who were killed at Uhud. Then قال: "A servant from the servants of Allaah has been given a choice by Allaah between this الدنيا and what is with Him; لذا he chose that which is with Allaah." لذا Aboo Bakr, radiyallaahu 'anhu, understood this and wept, and said: "May my الأب and الأم be a ransom for you, we would pay our fathers our mothers, our الأولاد, our selves, and our الثروة as a ransom for you." لذا النبي ﷺ (Uj£) said: "Do not be hasty, O Aboo Bakr" Then قال: "The person who has favoured me most with his companionship and his الثروة is Aboo Bakr, and إذا I were to take someone as the one particularly beloved friend to me بالإضافة إلى my Lord, then I would have taken Aboo Bakr as such. غير أن it is rather the Islamic friendship and المحبة." Then he ordered that Aboo Bakr should lead the people in the الصلاة. Then عندما it was the day of Monday - the twelfth or thirteenth of the month of Rabee'ulAwwal, of the eleventh year بعد the hijrah, Allaah chose him for His company. لذا عندما الموت came to him he began dipping his hand into some water he had بالإضافة إلى him, and wiping his face and saying: ''None has the الحق to be worshipped except Allaah, indeed الموت has its agonies" Then he turned his sight towards the heavens and said: "O Allaah, amongst the highest companionship." لذا he passed away on that day, and the people were greatly distressed and disturbed بسبب that, and rightly لذا. حتى Aboo Bakr, radiyallaahu 'anhu, came and ascended the mimbar and praised and exalted Allaah, and then said: "To proceed, then whoever worshipped محمد ﷺ, then محمد ﷺ has died; and whoever worships Allaah, then Allaah lives and never dies." Then he recited: "محمد ﷺ is but a messenger, الرسل have passed away قبل him. لذا إذا he dies or is killed will you turn back from you Religion." [السورة Aal-Tmraan (3):144] "O محمد ﷺ (30,), you will soon die and your people, those who deny you and those who believe - will die." [السورة az-Zumar (39):30] لذا the people wept severely and knew that he had died. لذا he was washed in his clothes out of الاحترام for him. Then he was shrouded in three pure white (cotton) sheets, with no robe or turban being used. Then
